name: auralis-codextrator
description: Parallel session orchestration, shared focus-board coordination, and a local admin dashboard for Codex.

scripts.test: node ./test/codextrator-focus-board.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-admin.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-cli.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-mcp.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-watch.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-wake-adapter.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-app-thread-discovery.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-daemon-watch.test.js && node ./test/codextrator-app-server-client.test.js
